allow: Bash(cp H:/Projects/GlobePlannerTemp/artisan H:/Projects/GlobePlanner/artisan && cp H:/Projects/GlobePlannerTemp/composer.lock H:/Projects/GlobePlanner/composer.lock && cp -r H:/Projects/GlobePlannerTemp/app H:/Projects/GlobePlanner/ && cp -r H:/Projects/GlobePlannerTemp/database H:/Projects/GlobePlanner/ && ls H:/Projects/GlobePlanner/)

Bash(ls -la H:/Projects/GlobePlannerTemp/ | grep "^\\." && cp H:/Projects/GlobePlannerTemp/.env H:/Projects/GlobePlanner/.env && cp H:/Projects/GlobePlannerTemp/.env.example H:/Projects/GlobePlanner/.env.example 2>&1)
